languages.text: Кощунственная реплика дворца на Даргонусе — лишь декорация, интерактивная диорама безумного ксеноса. Но именно там должны покоиться останки Себериана и Багряная пляска Кхейна.
The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.
languages.original_text: Кощунственная реплика дворца на Даргонусе — лишь декорация, интерактивная диорама безумного ксеноса. Но именно там должны покоиться останки Себериана и Багряная пляска Кхейна.

traits.locale_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

languages.text: Die blasphemische Replik des Palastes von Dargonus ist eine bloße Fassade, ein interaktives Diorama eines verrückten Xenos. Aber genau dort liegen Seberians Überreste und Blutroter Tanz von Khaine.
languages.original_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

traits.locale_text: Die blasphemische Replik des Palastes von Dargonus ist eine bloße Fassade, ein interaktives Diorama eines verrückten Xenos. Aber genau dort liegen Seberians Überreste und Blutroter Tanz von Khaine.

languages.text: La réplique blasphématoire du palais de Dargonus n'est qu'une illusion, un diorama interactif créé par un xénos dément. Cependant, il est des plus probables que ce soit ici que reposent la Danse écarlate de Khaine et le corps de Seberian.
languages.original_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

traits.locale_text: La réplique blasphématoire du palais de Dargonus n'est qu'une illusion, un diorama interactif créé par un xénos dément. Cependant, il est des plus probables que ce soit ici que reposent la Danse écarlate de Khaine et le corps de Seberian.

languages.text: 达戈努斯宫殿那亵渎的复制品不过是徒有其表的空壳，是某个疯狂异形制造的互动式实景模型。但塞贝里安的遗骸和凯恩的猩红之舞肯定就在里面。
languages.original_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

traits.locale_text: 达戈努斯宫殿那亵渎的复制品不过是徒有其表的空壳，是某个疯狂异形制造的互动式实景模型。但塞贝里安的遗骸和凯恩的猩红之舞肯定就在里面。

languages.text: La blasfema réplica del palacio de Dargonus es una mera imitación, el diorama interactivo de un xenos desquiciado. Sin embargo, es en su interior donde yacen los restos de Seberian y la Danza Carmesí de Khaine.
languages.original_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

traits.locale_text: La blasfema réplica del palacio de Dargonus es una mera imitación, el diorama interactivo de un xenos desquiciado. Sin embargo, es en su interior donde yacen los restos de Seberian y la Danza Carmesí de Khaine.

languages.text: ダーゴヌスの宮殿の冒涜的なレプリカは、狂気のゼノスのインタラクティブなジオラマに過ぎない。しかし、そこにはセベリアンとブラッドハンド・フューリーの亡骸が眠っているはずだ。
languages.original_text: The sacrilegious replica of the palace on Dargonus is just a set, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But that's where the remains of Seberian and the Blood-Handed Fury should rest.

languages.text: Dargonus'taki sarayın kâfirce kopyası; deli bir zenonun etkileşimli diyoramasından, sadece bir yanılsamadan ibaret. Ancak Seberian'ın kalıntılarının ve Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın orada yattığı kesin.
languages.original_text: The blasphemous replica of the palace on Dargonus is a mere facade, an interactive diorama of a mad xenos. But it is there that Seberian's remains and the Crimson Dance of Khaine are bound to lie.

traits.locale_text: Dargonus'taki sarayın kâfirce kopyası; deli bir zenonun etkileşimli diyoramasından, sadece bir yanılsamadan ibaret. Ancak Seberian'ın kalıntılarının ve Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın orada yattığı kesin.
